owner_mapping_note: Responsible institutions are SafeTrace editorial mappings for public navigation, not formal assignments made by GRECO.

recommendations.title: Integrity rules with dedicated enforcement
recommendations.recommendation: Adopt a specific code of conduct for top executive functions with guidance on conflicts, gifts, outside activities and lobbying, coupled with control and enforcement.
recommendations.status_reason: The guidance and code were accepted, but GRECO found no dedicated procedure to monitor compliance or sanction non-compliance.

recommendations.title: Regular integrity briefings
recommendations.recommendation: Give ministers and parliamentary state secretaries systematic integrity briefings when taking office and at regular intervals.
recommendations.status_reason: Initial letters were a positive start, but no new progress toward regular briefings was reported.

recommendations.title: Independent review of access to information
recommendations.recommendation: Conduct an independent, thorough analysis of the Freedom of Information Act and improve federal access to information where necessary.
recommendations.status_reason: GRECO found no new development beyond work described as in progress.

recommendations.title: Legislative footprint
recommendations.recommendation: Identify, document and disclose substantive external inputs to draft legislation, including inputs received before formal consultation.
recommendations.status_reason: GRECO accepted the executive footprint introduced through amended ministerial rules.

recommendations.title: Transparent meetings with lobbyists
recommendations.recommendation: Set detailed rules for contacts between top executive officials and lobbyists, and disclose who met whom, on whose behalf and about what.
recommendations.status_reason: The Lobby Register framework was strengthened, but sufficient information on direct contacts and meetings is still not disclosed.

recommendations.title: Ad hoc conflict-of-interest disclosure
recommendations.recommendation: Provide clear conflict-management guidance and require top executive officials to disclose conflicts between private interests and official functions when they occur.
recommendations.status_reason: GRECO found no new measures and no unequivocal ad hoc disclosure obligation.

recommendations.title: Revolving-door controls
recommendations.recommendation: Make post-public-employment decisions consistent and transparent and consider stronger cooling-off rules, advisory arrangements and sanctions.
recommendations.status_reason: Rules for former senior civil servants improved, but the issues concerning ministers and parliamentary state secretaries were not fully addressed.

recommendations.title: Public financial-interest declarations
recommendations.recommendation: Require regular public declarations of financial interests, consider family information with privacy safeguards, and subject declarations to appropriate review.
recommendations.status_reason: GRECO found no tangible progress or new information.

recommendations.title: Police-specific integrity codes
recommendations.recommendation: Tailor anti-corruption conduct standards to the Federal Criminal Police Office and Federal Police, with examples, oversight and enforcement.
recommendations.status_reason: GRECO accepted the agency-specific codes and the available disciplinary and criminal enforcement mechanisms.

recommendations.title: Risk-tailored integrity training
recommendations.recommendation: Enhance initial and in-service integrity training for the Federal Police and tailor it to the needs and risks of different staff categories.
recommendations.status_reason: GRECO's 2025 conclusion records recommendation x as implemented satisfactorily; it had been resolved before the outstanding recommendations were re-examined.
recommendations.source_anchor: Evaluation Report, para. 119; Second Compliance Report, conclusion para. 82

recommendations.title: Repeated screening of police personnel
recommendations.recommendation: Strengthen screening of new Federal Police recruits and repeat screening at regular intervals throughout police careers.
recommendations.status_reason: Proposed checks remained one-off recruitment checks and did not provide comprehensive recurring screening.

recommendations.title: Proactive internal oversight
recommendations.recommendation: Provide stricter internal oversight in the Federal Police using a proactive approach with comprehensive monitoring capacity.
recommendations.status_reason: GRECO found no significant development toward proactive internal oversight.

recommendations.title: Whistleblower protection
recommendations.recommendation: Strengthen whistleblower protection in the Federal Criminal Police Office and Federal Police.
recommendations.status_reason: GRECO accepted the Whistleblower Protection Act, reporting channels and protection against retaliation.

recommendations.title: Public complaints and sanctions data
recommendations.recommendation: Publish information on complaints, actions and sanctions concerning Federal Police and Federal Criminal Police Office staff while protecting anonymity.
recommendations.status_reason: Federal integrity reports provide some information, but not proactive agency-specific statistics for the two police bodies.
